Subject: AI & Careers — SDT paper + pick a pilot (PM‑first)

Hi Shujaat,

Loved the conversation. Your weekly myth‑busting cadence and insistence on human judgment with AI align tightly with what we’re building at Careerspan. The idea of “base athleticism” (adaptability, learning‑how‑to‑learn, relationship leverage) as the substrate for growth really resonated.

What I’ll send
• The self‑determination theory (SDT) write‑up, and a 1‑pager on how SDT maps to career motivation and skill adoption for PMs.  [refs: #/ctas/0, #/ctas/2]

Two pilot options (choose one to start)
1) AI & Careers Myth‑Busting (weekly, short): 1 case per week where we replace hype with a concrete workflow and before/after results from PM contexts.  [ref: #/topics/2]
2) “Base Athleticism” Toolkit (4‑week micro‑series): crisp exercises for communication, feedback loops, and relationship leverage that compound on the job.  [ref: #/topics/1]

If you’re open to it, could we book 30 minutes next week to pick a pilot, choose 1–2 success metrics, and agree the first deliverable? I’ll send the SDT doc immediately and draft the 1‑pager so we can react to something concrete.  [refs: #/ctas/3, #/ctas/4]

Thanks,
Logan
